title: [Stories to Tell] The Stoneville Incident
description:
"Stories to Tell" is a series of psychological horror games developed by a 16-year-old in which each installment is based on a dream or nightmare that I, the developer, have experienced. This is a game you won't want to miss...

Hello, my name is zebaxx. I’m a 16-year-old game developer from Spain. I had this nightmare a while ago… I still remember it clearly because I always write down my nightmares when I wake up.

In [Stories to Tell] The Stoneville Incident, the player takes on the role of a young guy who documents his move into a new house through vlogs, in a style inspired by YouTube content. What begins as casual, everyday recording quickly turns into a series of disturbing and increasingly dangerous events.

[The game lasts approximately 15 to 20 minutes]

Gameplay[Stories to Tell] The Stoneville Incident is a first-person psychological horror experience focused on exploration, environmental storytelling, and found-footage-style presentation.

Key Features of [Stories to Tell] The Stoneville Incident• VHS aesthetic with a found-footage style.

• A protagonist who documents their experience through vlogs.

• First-person immersive gameplay.

• Exploration, tension, and chase sequences.

• Visual presentation inspired by analog recordings.

• Short and intense horror experience.

*Add it to your wishlist to support me :)*
description_short: "Stories to Tell" Is a psychological horror game series developed by a 16 year old were each installment is based on a dream/nightmare that I, the developer, have experienced. This is a game you wouldn't want to miss...
